title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.580 - Notice to obligors in bond
text:
521.580.  Notice to obligors in bond. — No judgment shall be rendered upon such motion, unless the plaintiff shall have given the obligors in the bond at least fifteen days' notice, in writing, of such motion.
(RSMo 1939 § 1492) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1328; 1919 § 1779; 1909 § 2348
